description: TDD: Validate REAL Sentry crash reporting with actual crashes

expected_result.description: Validates intentional crashes for Sentry crash reporting
patterns: Invalid call. Nonexistent function 'some_method_that_does_not_exist' in base 'Nil'
Trying to assign value of type 'Node' to a variable of type 'Button'
Cannot get path of node as it is not in a scene tree

test_metadata.notes: TDD Phase 3: Generate REAL crashes to validate actual Sentry crash reporting with proper stack traces and native frame preservation
